details.test: Task 1: Find grain-free salmon dry dog food and add to favorites
Task 2: Compare two foods and add higher-protein one to compare list
Task 3: Use feeding calculator for 25 kg dog and save plan
Task 4: Add three products to cart with specific quantities
Task 5: Find store carrying specific dry food and set as preferred
Task 6: Subscribe to puppy tips newsletter from article
Task 7: Read help article about switching food and submit contact question
Task 8: Create mixed feeding plan and save to pet profile
Task 9: Use product finder quiz for senior large dog with joint concerns and view ingredients
